root.name: Add a subtitle below the main title on slide 1 that says 'A Comprehensive Review'
root.description: Evaluates whether a subtitle with the exact text 'A Comprehensive Review' was correctly added directly below the main title on slide 1, with proper placement and without introducing extraneous changes.

children.name: A subtitle with the exact text was added to slide 1
children.description: Checks that a new text box (or subtitle placeholder) with the exact text 'A Comprehensive Review' was added to slide 1.

children.name: Subtitle is positioned directly below the main title
children.description: Checks that the subtitle is visually placed directly below the main title on slide 1, with no other intervening elements.

children.name: No extraneous changes were made to slide 1
children.description: Ensures that no changes other than the addition of the subtitle were made to slide 1 (e.g., no unrelated text boxes, images, or modifications to existing content).

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # We want to check that only one new text element (the subtitle) was added to slide 1, and no other elements were removed/modified/added.
    added_elements = []
    removed_elements = []
    modified_elements = []
    # Use pptx to get the shapes/texts for slide 1 in both versions
    from pptx import Presentation
    orig_slide = Presentation(original_ppt_path).slides[0]
    mod_slide = Presentation(modified_ppt_path).slides[0]
    def get_shape_signatures(slide):
        sigs = []
        for shape in slide.shapes:
            if shape.has_text_frame:
                sigs.append(('text', shape.text_frame.text.strip()))
            elif shape.shape_type == 13:  # PICTURE
                sigs.append(('image', getattr(shape, 'image', None)))
            else:
                sigs.append(('other', shape.shape_type))
        return sigs
    orig_sigs = set(get_shape_signatures(orig_slide))
    mod_sigs = set(get_shape_signatures(mod_slide))
    added = mod_sigs - orig_sigs
    removed = orig_sigs - mod_sigs
    # Only allowed: one new text element 'A Comprehensive Review', no others
    if removed:
        return f"Unexpected elements removed from slide 1: {removed}", 0.0
    allowed_add = {('text', 'A Comprehensive Review')}
    extraneous = added - allowed_add
    if extraneous:
        return f"Extraneous elements added to slide 1: {extraneous}", 0.0
    # Make sure 'A Comprehensive Review' was actually added (redundant with other node but safe)
    if ('text', 'A Comprehensive Review') in added:
        return "No extraneous changes; only the subtitle text was added.", 1.0
    return "Subtitle not found added in diff.", 0.0

children.name: No extraneous changes elsewhere in the presentation
children.description: Checks that no slides other than slide 1 were changed (no slides added/removed/modified, no animations or transitions changed, etc.).

metadata.task: Add a subtitle below the main title on slide 1 that says 'A Comprehensive Review'
